mapper.sql: id, article_id, root_id, parent_id, type, content_markdown, content_html, nickname, email_ciphertext, website, anonymous_key_hash, status, is_admin_reply, notify_on_reply, ip_hash, user_agent_summary, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND allow_comment = 1 )
SELECT FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND type = 'ARTICLE' AND status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at, id
SELECT FROM comment WHERE article_id IS NULL AND type = 'MESSAGE' AND status = 'APPROVED' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT slug FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE anonymous_key_hash = #{anonymousKeyHash} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE comment SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE (id = #{id} OR root_id = #{id}) AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE article a SET a.comment_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.article_id = a.id AND c.status = 'APPROVED' AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ) WHERE a.id = #{articleId}
